title: Velvety Energizing Canadian Beef Stir-fry
description: This dish is designed to be energizing and rich in umami flavors, using creme fraiche as a key ingredient for its velvety texture and smooth taste.
instructions: Marinate beef strips with lime juice, soy sauce, ginger paste, red pepper flakes, and crushed garlic for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a wok or large frying pan over high heat. Add a bit of olive oil if needed.
Add zucchini slices to the pan and stir-fry until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove zucchini and set aside. Season beef with salt and black pepper, then add it to the pan and stir-fry until cooked through, approximately 5-7 minutes.
Return zucchini back into the pan along with bell peppers. Stir-fry for another minute or so to combine all ingredients.
In a small bowl, mix creme fraiche with lime juice (if using) until well combined. Pour this mixture over the stir-fried beef and vegetables in the pan.
Stir everything together gently to incorporate the creme fraiche mixture evenly into the dish. Cook for an additional minute or two until heated through.
Serve hot as a side dish with rice.
